login.title: Partner Login
login.subtitle: Access your partner dashboard
login.legalPrefix: By clicking continue, you agree to our

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your details to get started
register.legalPrefix: By clicking continue, you agree to our
register.successMessage: Thank you for registering. To activate your account, please check your email and click on the verification link we sent you.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Enter one of your recovery codes to sign in
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Please enter a valid recovery code (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Having trouble? Contact support for assistance.

setup.subtitle: Let's get you set up. Please select your account type to continue.
setup.clinicDescription: I represent a medical clinic or healthcare facility with multiple practitioners
setup.labDescription: I represent a diagnostic laboratory or testing facility
setup.individualDescription: I am an individual healthcare practitioner or researcher
setup.setupError: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.

messages.errorFallback: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

success.title: Check your email
success.sentTo: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
success.description: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password. The link expires in 1 hour.
success.retry: Didn't receive the email? Try again

form.title: Forgot your password?
form.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

messages.errorFallback: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

success.title: Password Reset Successful
success.description: Your password has been updated successfully.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Please use the link from your email.
messages.successFallback: Your email has been confirmed successfully.
messages.errorFallback: Failed to confirm email. The link may have expired.

state.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
state.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified.
state.errorDescription: We couldn't confirm your email address.

success.nextStep: You can now sign in to your account with your email and password.

error.helpText: If this persists, contact support or register again.
